report.headline: Signs of Myocardial Infarction Detected
report.summary: Abnormal Q-waves and ST-segment changes consistent with prior or evolving myocardial infarction. The model concentrated on the early QRS complex and ST segment — the hallmark regions for ischaemic injury.
report.disclaimer: This output is generated by a research model trained on the PTB-XL dataset. It is not validated for clinical use and must not be used for diagnosis or treatment decisions.
